---
title: "Philosophical Transactions Explorer"
---

This site explores **8,545 articles** from the [*Philosophical Transactions of
the Royal Society*](https://royalsocietypublishing.org/rstl) across **1665–1886** — counts by topic, author, and
article length, plus how each of those changes over time.

## Where to start

- **[Topics](topics.qmd)** — distribution of the 25 topical labels, with the
  *Experiment* topic as a worked example.
- **[Authors](authors.qmd)** — the most prolific contributors, their career
  spans, and collaboration patterns.
- **[Length](length.qmd)** — how page counts are distributed and how typical
  article length has changed over two centuries.
- **[Dashboard](dashboard.qmd)** — combine filters across year, topic, and
  author with live-updating charts.
- **[Browse](browse.qmd)** — every article, sortable and searchable, with
  links out to royalsocietypublishing.org.

::: {.callout-note}
## What's published

Pre-computed aggregates (counts by year, by topic, by author, by page length)
and bibliographic metadata for every article (title, DOI, year, topic, author
names, link to the publisher). The raw SQLite metadata file and the
scraper's internal URLs are not published. See [About](about.qmd) for the
full statement.
:::
